brand_dna.category: Handmade metaphysical crystal jewelry - one of a kind and small batch talismans crafted in San Francisco.
brand_dna.core_belief: Jewelry is alchemy and transformation - each piece is a talisman made to bring out your inner rockstar, one gem at a time.
proof_points: Handcrafted by Elizabeth Cline in her San Francisco studio, in business since 2019
Authentic Moldavite and ethically sourced natural crystals and gemstones from around the world
One of a kind and small batch pieces; every stone is unique in shape, color and organic imperfections
14k gold fill and gold plated components; arrives wrapped in a signature Dreamers Jewelry Box
brand_dna.positioning: Premium, artist-made wearable art at a mid-to-high price point - intentional and spiritual, not mass-produced or trend-driven.

voice_pillars.name: Empowering Rockstar
voice_pillars.desc: Speaks to the wearer as already powerful, urging her to own her confidence boldly.
voice_pillars.quote: You were born ready; own it like the badass you are!

voice_pillars.name: Mystical + Sacred
voice_pillars.desc: Frames jewelry as ritual, alchemy and energy you can wear against your skin.
voice_pillars.quote: Each piece is a talisman of transformation.

voice_pillars.name: Handmade + Intentional
voice_pillars.desc: Emphasizes slow, one-at-a-time craft infused with meaning and love.
voice_pillars.quote: Meticulously crafted, one piece at a time, in the heart of San Francisco.

voice_pillars.name: Warm + Personal
voice_pillars.desc: Founder speaks in first person, treating each piece and buyer as a personal labor of love.
voice_pillars.quote: Each piece is a labor of love with symbolic meaning.

phrases: own it like the badass you are
awaken the goddess or queen within you
packaging as special as the piece inside

icp: Spiritually curious women who value handmade, meaningful pieces and buy jewelry as a talisman for confidence, transformation and personal ritual - and are willing to invest in one of a kind art.

personas.name: The Mystic Seeker
personas.description: A crystal-loving woman drawn to energy, chakras and ritual who buys pieces chosen intuitively for their symbolic meaning.

personas.name: The Inner Rockstar
personas.description: A bold self-expresser who wants jewelry that makes her feel like a warrior queen and gets noticed - moved by empowerment and confidence angles.

personas.name: The Meaningful Gifter
personas.description: A thoughtful buyer shopping for someone ready to step into their power, drawn by the unboxing experience and signature Dreamers Box.

offers: 30 Day Returns on unworn jewelry (exchanges for store credit on gifts)
One of a Kind, Moldavite, Herkimer Diamond and custom/made to order pieces are final sale
Worldwide shipping (USPS and DHL, cost calculated at checkout)
Loyalty Program and Subscription Box available
Gift Cards and 'Meaningful Gold: Under $100' entry-price collection

allowed.claim: Handcrafted by Elizabeth Cline in San Francisco.
Made with authentic Moldavite and ethically sourced natural crystals and gemstones.
One of a kind - each stone is unique in shape, color and organic imperfections.
Made with 14k gold fill chain and lobster clasp (Petite Diamond Quartz Infinity Necklace).
Arrives wrapped in a signature Dreamers Jewelry Box.
30 day returns on unworn jewelry and worldwide shipping.

banned.claim: Calling the jewelry 'sustainable' or 'eco-friendly' without specific backing.
banned.why: FTC Green Guides - unqualified sustainability claim not substantiated on site.

banned.claim: Saying crystals are 'ethically sourced' as a blanket eco/social claim without verifiable proof.
banned.why: FTC Green Guides - vague sourcing claim needs specific, verifiable backing beyond the site statement.

banned.claim: Stating the crystals 'heal', 'relieve pain' or treat any medical or physical condition.
banned.why: Banned medical claim - no health or orthopedic benefits may be promised.

banned.claim: Claiming Moldavite or crystals 'download ancient wisdom' or deliver guaranteed energetic results as fact.
banned.why: Unprovable outcome claim - keep metaphysical language framed as tradition or intention, not a promised result.

banned.claim: Describing packaging or materials as 'zero impact' or '100% recycled'.
banned.why: FTC Green Guides - unqualified environmental claim with no verifiable substantiation.
